## 3dslibris 2.7.0

Library organization improvements.

### New

- **First-level folder navigation in the library**: books can now be organized into one level of folders under the configured book directory. The root library shows folders first, then root-level books; opening a folder shows the books directly inside it, with `B` or the touch **back** button returning to the root library. Folder entries are not treated as books, so they do not trigger metadata indexing, cover extraction, TOC resolution, page cache work, warmup jobs, or book-open paths. Optional sibling folder covers are supported with `FolderName.jpg`. See [#41](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/41).
- **Continuous D-Pad page turning for reflowable books**: holding D-Pad Up/Down now repeats previous/next page turns after a short delay in EPUB, MOBI, FB2, TXT, RTF, and ODT books. Fixed-layout documents keep their existing single-step page/chapter navigation. A new general setting allows disabling Circle Pad page turns for users affected by analog drift. See [#24](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/24).

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Library organization:** Thanks to everyone who asked for folder support and helped validate the browser flow.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
